title: Rixa4on pvp 16x
description: A PVP texture pack .It is inspired by looshy pack and enhanced default pack.
body: A lightweight, performance-focused resource pack built to maximize your FPS and give you a clean, competitive edge in PvP.This pack strips away visual distractions while keeping the game looking sharp and stylish.This pack is a personal edit made for fun! It features a mixture of textures and inspiration from a few awesome packs in the community, including Looshy, Enhanced Default, and Swight V3. All credit goes to the original creators for their base assets!
